description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is predominantly rectangular, with a large overhanging roof that creates a shaded area along one side. There is a notable cut-out section in the roof, possibly for a skylight or small courtyard, and a cluster of vertical elements beneath the overhang that may represent decorative columns or landscaping. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a group of smaller windows on one side and a larger opening on another. The exterior appears to be finished in smooth, light-colored materials, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall form is low and wide, emphasizing horizontal lines typical of modern bungalow architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with clean lines, a large overhang, and asymmetrical window placement. The exterior is smooth and light-colored, with a distinctive roof cut-out and vertical decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front facade shows the large overhanging roof, a cut-out section, and a cluster of vertical elements beneath the overhang.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the overhang, the open area beneath the roof, and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the wide, flat roof, grouped vertical elements, and a set of small windows on one side.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the roof cut-out and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the structure.
